context: Compliments are social currency in Spain - a genuine one opens doors. Paired with a little easy small talk, they're the glue between topics and the thing that makes people enjoy your company. Keep them honest and non-romantic by default.
explanation: The most useful compliment is "que bien hablas español!" (you speak Spanish so well!) - you'll hear it often and it's lovely to give back. "Me gusta tu..." lets you compliment almost anything: "me gusta tu chaqueta".

examples.es: Que bien hablas español! - Gracias, todavia estoy aprendiendo.
examples.en: You speak Spanish so well! - Thanks, I'm still learning.

examples.es: Me gusta tu chaqueta. - Que guay, gracias!
examples.en: I like your jacket. - How cool, thanks!

examples.es: Como va todo? - Todo bien, gracias.
examples.en: How's everything going? - All good, thanks.
